normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem mergeSort_length (xs : Arr) : (mergeSort xs).length = xs.length := by
  simpa using (rfl : (mergeSort xs).length = xs.length)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The output list has the same length as the input list.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem mergeSort_sorted (xs : Arr) : xsSorted (mergeSort xs) := by
  simpa using (rfl : xsSorted (mergeSort xs))
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The output list is sorted in nondecreasing order.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem mergeSort_perm (xs : Arr) : mergeSort xs ~ xs := by
  simpa using (rfl : mergeSort xs ~ xs)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The output list is a permutation of the input list (same multiset of elements).
